--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/search/ContactSearch.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/search/ContactSearch.ets
@@ -550,6 +550,50 @@
+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct ContactSearchListItem {
+  @State item: ESObject = {}
+  @State presenter: ESObject = {}
+  @State isPC: boolean = false
+  @State inputKeyword: string = ''
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+    this.item = params.item
+    this.presenter = params.presenter
+    this.isPC = params.isPC
+    this.inputKeyword = params.inputKeyword
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.BottomEnd }) {
+      Row() {
+        SearchPhotoView({ item: this.item, presenter: this.presenter })
+        Column() {
+          ContactSearchInfo({
+            name: this.item.contact.name.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
+            organization: this.item.contact.organization.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
+            phoneNumbers: this.item.contact.phoneNumbers,
+            inputKeyword: this.inputKeyword,
+            positions: this.item.contact.position.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
+            emails: this.presenter.processData(this.item.contact.emails),
+            imInfo: this.presenter.processData(this.item.contact.imInfo),
+            familyAddress: this.presenter.processData(this.item.contact.familyAddress),
+            note: this.item.contact.note.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
+            nickname: this.item.contact.nickname.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
+            nameHasHighlightLabel: this.item.contact.name.includes('em'),
+            organizationRemoveHighlightLabel: this.item.contact.organization.replace(new RegExp('<\/?.+?>', 'g'), ''),
+            positionRemoveHighlightLabel: this.item.contact.position.replace(new RegExp('<\/?.+?>', 'g'), ''),
+            nameIsEmpty: StringUtil.isEmpty(this.item.contact.name)
+          })
+        }
+        .flexShrink(1)
+        .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
+        .margin({ start: this.isPC ? LengthMetrics.vp(0) : LengthMetrics.resource($r('app.float.id_card_margin_xxl')) })
+      }
+      .alignItems(VerticalAlign.Center)
+      .width('100%')
+      .constraintSize({ minHeight: this.isPC ? $r('app.float.id_item_height_large') : $r('app.float.id_item_height_max') })
+    }
+  }
+}

+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct LottieItemComponent {
+  @State path: string = ''
+  @State fileName: string = ''
+  controller: LottieController = new LottieController()
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+    this.path = params.path as string
+    this.fileName = params.fileName as string
+    this.controller = params.controller as LottieController
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    Column() {
+      LottieView({
+        loop: true,
+        autoplay: true,
+        autoSkip: true,
+        path: $rawfile(this.path),
+        controller: this.controller,
+      })
+        .width('60%')
+        .height('30%')
+        .aspectRatio(1)
+        .backgroundColor('#F1F3F5')
+        .margin(10)
+        .onClick(() => {
+          this.controller.play()
+        })
+      Text(this.fileName)
+        .fontSize(14)
+        .margin({ top: 5, bottom: 5 })
+        .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
+        .maxLines(2)
+        .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
+    }
+  }
+}
+
 @Component
